arts.ttl: Tension and support at Torino’s Filadelfia ahead of the derby
arts.sum: As the highly anticipated derby between Torino and Juventus approaches, excitement and tension fill the air at the Filadelfia training center. Coach Paolo Vanoli opened the doors to the facility, welcoming around a thousand passionate fans who gathered to support their team ahead of this crucial match. However, the atmosphere was not solely one of encouragement. A significant protest emerged against Torino’s president, Urbano Cairo. Before the training session commenced, ultras displayed a bold banner that read: “We want Cairo out of here.” The statement reflects the deep frustration among some supporters regarding the club’s management and performance.
